title: Workloads by Department

posts.author: torrie (Torrie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would love to be able to create dahboards for things like workload & active projects for department leads to visit in order to check on what is happening within their specific department.

We assign departments to users, but as far as I see, it is relatively meaningless as there is no functionality allowing you to filter or sort by department.

Our workspaces/boards are not broken down by department, but rather:
Workspaces: Clients
Boards: Projects

So other than having functionality to specifically filter by the departments of those listed in each “people” column, there is no way to get an at a glance view of workloads per department.
